rows.label: qev065504_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nnngh!
It's just been boring jobs lately,
so I haven't gone wild enough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0002
rows.name:
Like... aren't there any jobs lying around
where I can just satisfyingly beat up
native creatures to my heart's content?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask her what kind of personality she has.

rows.label: qev065504_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell her that Lyvia wants to meet her.

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm not smart, but I've got plenty of energy!
Ah... even when it comes to piloting a Doll,
I won't lose to any ordinary guy, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0004
rows.name:
Just the other day, during a mock battle,
I beat down every single guy on my team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Relationships with men?
With a personality like this, I've been single this whole time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0006
rows.name:
Well, I don't really mind.
I don't have the free time to be
obsessing over romance anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Eeeeh!?
There's a man who wants to meet me!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0008
rows.name:
Wait, it's that, right? It's not like
he's challenging me to a fight, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Well, whatever.
I'll go take a look at the face of this brave man.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Well, he doesn't look bad on the outside.
Is this guy really
falling for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0011
rows.name:
Is he really looking at me
as a woman?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065504_MSG0012
rows.name: If so... I'd be really happy.[ST:wait ]
